output: Executed batch 5 task T5 in `AgentChat.tsx`. I removed the processing/pending send gates from the text input and send button so users can keep typing and submit queued messages while the current turn is still running, and I updated the placeholder to switch into queue mode whenever the chat is busy. Checkpoint written to `reigh-app/.megaplan/plans/add-a-message-queue-to-the-20260414-1343/execution_batch_5.json`. Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes; `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails on the known pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx` (`useLocation()` outside a Router).
deviations: `npm test -- AgentChat` remains red for the same pre-existing baseline issue from earlier batches: `AgentChat.test.tsx` renders `AgentChat` without a Router, so `useLocation()` throws before assertions. I did not scope-creep into test harness changes in this batch.

task_updates.executor_notes: Updated the input/send gating in `src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` so typing remains enabled during agent processing and the send button is no longer blocked by `isProcessing` or `sendMessage.isPending`. The input placeholder now switches to queue-aware copy when the agent is busy or items are already queued. Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes. `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails on the pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx` where `useLocation()` is called outside a Router.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `isProcessing` and `sendMessage.isPending` were removed from the input/send disabled conditions while the existing timeline/session/cancelled/voice guards remain, and the placeholder now changes to queue-aware copy whenever processing is active, the mutation is pending, or queued messages exist.
